sections.paragraph: ἀλληγορέω [ἄλλος, ἀγείρω ‘gather together’ (cp. ἀγορά)] ‘to convey a sense dif-ferent from what would normally be understood by having certain referents stand for or symbolize something else’, express symbolically Gal 4:24. (Paul’s interpretive approach is not strictly allegorical, for the referents that are symbolized retain their historical/literal identity.)
